data.body: 526 MERGED but 3b4e verifier wanted the CONTENDED case for COMPACT too (delete/init had both; compact had only stale). Added test_compact_rides_out_contended_index_lock, pushed Gerrit 527. Now all 3 paths (compact/delete/init) x both scenarios (stale-reclaim + contended-ride-out) covered. ALL 10 BUGS CLOSED; only 3b4e pending 527 merge+close. Next: land 527, close 3b4e, DONE.
